## Added
- **Capture Crate** — a reusable, multi-capacity sibling of the Capture Net. Holds up to 10 mixed mobs at once, each with its full data preserved (variant, custom name, age, villager trades, and more).
  - Right-click a mob to capture and add it to the crate.
  - Right-click the ground to release the currently selected mob; sneak + right-click to cycle which mob comes out next.
  - A capacity bar shows how full the crate is at a glance.
  - Crafted from a Capture Net + an Ender Chest (with iron and string) — a mid-game upgrade.
